summary: Tested all features from the large batch implementation. Most features working correctly. Fixed critical bug in StudentProfilePage.jsx (missing recharts imports). Found Analytics Overview page data bug and minor issues.

ui_bugs.issue: MTSS Tier Distribution shows all 0s and 'Screened: undefined% of total'. The frontend accesses `schoolData.tier_distribution?.[1]` but the /api/analytics/school-wide endpoint returns `tier_by_year` (not `tier_distribution`). Missing field causes all values to be 0.

Students list doesn't show preferred names in 'FirstName (PreferredName) LastName' format. Shows only 'FirstName LastName'. Preferred names work correctly in Interventions, Alerts, and Meeting Prep pages.

action_items: Fix Analytics Overview: /api/analytics/school-wide response does not include `tier_distribution` key. Frontend (AnalyticsPage.jsx line 75-77) accesses `sd.tier_distribution?.[1/2/3]`. Either add `tier_distribution` to school-wide API response OR update frontend to aggregate from `tier_by_year`. Also `total_screened` / `screened_pct` fields missing - causing 'undefined%' display.
Fix Students list to show preferred names in 'FirstName (PreferredName) LastName' format (already working in other pages - just apply same displayName logic to StudentsPage table rows)
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: StudentProfilePage.jsx was missing recharts imports (ResponsiveContainer, RadarChart, Radar, PolarGrid, PolarAngleAxis, PolarRadiusAxis, LineChart, Line, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, ReferenceArea) - caused crash on student profile page. Fixed by adding recharts imports.

AnalyticsPage.jsx uses `sd.tier_distribution?.[1]` but school-wide API returns `tier_by_year` object with string keys. Frontend needs to either: (a) sum tier values from tier_by_year, or (b) backend needs to add tier_distribution with numeric keys to school-wide endpoint.
test_credentials: session_token=test_session_1773798244604 (admin user, expires 7 days from test)
seed_data_creation: Ran POST /api/settings/seed - created 32 students with sussi_id/preferred_name, 23 interventions, 30 alerts, 133 attendance records
context_for_next_testing_agent: StudentProfilePage.jsx recharts import bug was fixed. Analytics Overview still shows 0s for tier distribution due to API field mismatch. Session token in test_credentials can be reused. All other features (Settings Imports/Integrations, Alerts tabs, Interventions modal, MTSS Meeting Tier Changes tab, Student Profile radar/edit/PDF) are working correctly.
rca_of_issue: StudentProfilePage.jsx bug: The file used recharts components (ResponsiveContainer, RadarChart, ReferenceArea, LineChart etc.) but never imported them from 'recharts'. Fixed by adding the recharts import. Analytics Overview bug: AnalyticsPage.jsx line 75-77 does `sd.tier_distribution?.[1]` but /api/analytics/school-wide returns `{ tier_by_year: {...}, domain_averages: {...}, total_students: 32 }` - no `tier_distribution` field with numeric keys.
